meta.name: research-summariser
meta.title: Research Summariser
meta.description: Paste a long article; an Anthropic LLM extracts named entities (people, orgs, places), categorises them, and renders a markdown report with sections per category.

inputs.name: articleText
inputs.description: Paste the article text directly. Either this or articleFile is required.

inputs.name: articleFile
inputs.description: Upload a .txt or .md file. Either this or articleText is required.

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: Markdown report grouped by entity category (people / orgs / places).

steps.description: Anthropic LLM extracts raw named entities from the article (surface form + sentence context).

hints.note: Coalesce: if articleFile is provided, read its UTF-8 contents; otherwise use articleText.

steps.description: Anthropic LLM categorises each entity (person/organisation/place), dedupes, and writes a 1-2 sentence description of each entity's role in the article. Single batched call given the full article + raw entity list.
Render a markdown file with three sections (People / Organisations / Places). Under each, list entities with their LLM-written description.
